description: Style Note Designed for the sporty soul, this pair of shorts from puma is crafted from soft and absorbent polyester fabric that offers exemplary comfort. The comfortable elasticated waistband sits snug, while you can further customise the Fit with the drawstring. Slip into these shorts when blazing the trail on a healthy run, or on casual day at home, and revel in heavenly comfort. Product Details White knee length shorts with an elasticated waistband and drawstrings on the inside, a pocket on the front right side, brand tab appliqued below the pocket, printed branding on the left thigh and a contrast piping on either sides Material and Care Shell: 100% polyester Lining: 65% polyester and 35% cotton Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
